settings.title: Settings
settings.webRemoteAccessDescription: Allow browser connections to this machine; localhost only by default.
settings.listenAddressDescription: Enter loopback IP or LAN IPv4.
settings.fontDescription: Applied immediately to the interface; defaults to shadcn/ui (Geist).
settings.themeDescription: Applied immediately to the interface; independent of host configuration.
settings.windowsMicaDescription: Desktop window material; solid color background when off.
settings.windowsMicaUnsupported: Current host does not support this option.
settings.transportOpenResponses: Open Responses compatible protocol (`/responses`); use when going through gateway or custom endpoint.
settings.transportVercelAiGateway: Call Open Responses via Vercel AI Gateway (`/responses`), using open-responses-compatible provider underneath.
settings.noDefaultRoles: This model currently has no default roles that can be set
settings.setImageGenModel: Set as default image generation model
settings.compactionDemoDescription: Simulate context-triggered compaction in the chat area: Compressing animation, Compaction summary streaming, and compressed assistant reply (no model call, not written to session).
settings.skillsDescription: Skills discovered in user and workspace directories.
settings.generateSkillTooltip: Go to main chat area, prefill /create-skill, and describe requirements in natural language
settings.deleteSkillConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}" ({{location}})? The entire directory (including SKILL.md) will be removed.
settings.name: Name
settings.skillDescPlaceholder: Briefly describe when to use and what it does
settings.extensionsDescription: Manage user-level extension ZIP import results and installed metadata.
settings.deleteExtensionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete extension "{{name}}"? This will remove the local installation directory.
settings.desktopCssDescription: This style will be injected as an extension layer into Desktop Renderer and can override UI appearance with stable `data-spirit-*` hooks.
settings.cliHookDescription: This is a CLI-only controlled semantic hook and will not execute in Desktop Renderer.
settings.mcpsDescription: Manage configured MCP servers on the Desktop side.
settings.deleteMcpConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete MCP server "{{name}}"? This will remove the corresponding configuration from local mcp.json.
settings.addMcpDescription: Form semantics are consistent with CLI: Stdio writes command, HTTP writes URL, metadata is interpreted by transport.
settings.mcpMetadataHint: Multiple entries separated by semicolons; HTTP supports `Key: Value` or `Key=Value`, Stdio uses `KEY=value`.
settings.cannotDeleteProviderGroup: Cannot delete provider group containing the current model
settings.activeModelKeepHint: An inference model must be kept at all times; to switch, set it on the target model.
settings.activeModelUsage: Used for chat, planning, and tool orchestration.
settings.imageGenModelUsage: Used for generate_image and other image outputs; after unchecking, no default image model will be specified.
settings.noDefaultRolesForModel: This model currently has no default roles that can be set.
settings.deleteModelConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete model "{{name}}"? Configuration and separately saved key will be removed together.
settings.deleteProviderGroupConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all models under "{{provider}}"? Configuration and key will be removed together.
settings.selectProviderDescription: Select a provider and fill in connection info.
settings.customConnectionDescription: First select API type, then fill in endpoint and key.
settings.providerConnectionDescription: First select API type, then fill in API Key; bulk imported models will use this type.
settings.providerSimpleDescription: Fill in API Key to connect.
settings.noModelsReturned: No models returned. Please check the key or endpoint.
settings.noExtensionSettings: This extension has declared an independent settings page, but has not yet declared any settings or secret slots.
settings.dreamDescription: Summarize recent session trends for the current workspace and branch in the background.
settings.collectorModelDescription: Used for background summarization; collection will not start when not selected.
settings.debugModeDescription: Subsequent collection sessions will be kept as traceable records.
settings.fontEnumerationFailed: Unable to enumerate system fonts; please try again in the Desktop client.
settings.newSkillDescription: Create a SKILL.md at the selected save location.

marketplace.title: Extensions
marketplace.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, description, or package
marketplace.extensionNotFound: Extension not found. Please return to the list.
marketplace.alreadyLatest: Already at latest version in catalog
marketplace.goToVersionList: Go to version list to select
marketplace.extensionNotSupported: Extension {{name}}@{{version}} does not support the current Desktop host.
marketplace.revokedExtensionWarning: "{{name}} {{version}}" is currently revoked. Only switch if you explicitly accept the risk.
marketplace.unverifiedExtensionWarning: "{{name}} {{version}}" has not been verified. Host-side compatibility checks will still be performed after confirmation.
marketplace.notVerifiedStatus: This extension is not currently verified.
marketplace.switchAdvice: It is recommended to review the required capabilities and README before switching. This confirmation only applies to this switch.

dreams.collectorRunning: Dreams are being collected. New recent trends will appear here soon.
dreams.missingModel: After selecting a collector model, Dreams will start summarizing recent work trends.
dreams.continueWorking: Continue working in the current workspace, and new dream summaries will appear here.
dreams.enableDreams: Enable Dreams to start accumulating recent work trends for the current workspace.
dreams.collectorRunningDetail: The collector is running in the background. More complete dream details will be displayed here when finished.
dreams.noDreamDetail: No dream details to show yet. They will gradually accumulate as you continue working.
dreams.debugEnabled: Debug mode is on. Subsequent collection sessions will be kept as traceable records.
dreams.debugDisabled: Debug mode is off. Only dream summaries are retained.
dreams.debugDetailEnabled: Dream debug logs retain more traceable information for inspecting the collection pipeline.
dreams.debugDetailDisabled: When debug mode is off, only collection artifacts are displayed here.
dreams.noDetails: No more detailed dream records yet.
dreams.scopeCollecting: Recent work trends are being accumulated in the current scope

app.commitAndPushHint: Commit and immediately push to the remote of the current branch.
app.pairingDescription: Enter the pairing code shown on the Desktop settings page.
app.pairingFailed: Pairing failed. Please check the pairing code.
app.compactionDemoDescription: Simulate Compressing → Compaction summary → Compacted reply (not written to session)
app.commitMessagePlaceholder: Commit message; will be auto-generated if left empty
app.commitDialogDescription: Create a Git commit for the current workspace.
app.readOnlySession: Debug session is read-only. Cannot send messages…
app.completeQuestionsAbove: Please complete the questionnaire above first
app.needMoreQuestions: A few more questions need to be confirmed
app.uncommittedChangesCannotSwitch: There are uncommitted changes in the workspace. Cannot switch to “{{branch}}”.
app.discardChangesWarning: After discarding changes, these local modifications will be permanently lost.
app.willSwitchBranch: Will switch to branch “{{branch}}” before sending.
app.uncommittedChangesMayFail: Uncommitted changes detected. Switch may fail.
app.approvalGuidancePlaceholder: Instructions for the model when adjustments are needed
app.rewindComplete: Rewind complete. {{count}} file changes need attention.
app.mergeToDefaultBranchDescription: Merge the current branch into the default branch.
app.mergeWarning: Please ensure changes in the Worktree are committed; the default branch must not have uncommitted changes.

workspace.planNotCreated: Plan has not been created yet. A managed plan.md will appear here once actual writes are detected.
workspace.unsavedChangesCloseConfirm: There are unsaved changes. Close anyway?
workspace.connectToShowFiles: Connect to a workspace to show the file tree
workspace.shellElectronOnly: Shell is only available in the Electron desktop version.

error.runtimeBusy: A response or approval is already being processed. Please wait.
error.runtimeBusySkill: A response or approval is currently in progress. Please try adding Skill later.
error.runtimeBusyDeleteSkill: A response or approval is currently in progress. Please try deleting Skill later.
error.cannotDeleteActiveModel: Cannot delete the current model. Please switch to another model first.
error.providerDeleteOnly: Only preset provider groups can be deleted.
error.cannotDeleteProviderWithActive: Cannot delete a provider group containing the current model. Please switch to another model first.
error.modelsAlreadyExist: All selected models already exist in the configuration.
error.mcpNameRequired: MCP server name cannot be empty.
error.mcpNameWhitespace: MCP server name cannot contain whitespace characters.
error.extensionZipRequired: Extension ZIP content cannot be empty.
error.readonlySessionCompact: The current debug session is read-only and cannot compact history.
error.pendingApprovalCompact: Currently waiting for approval or questionnaire; cannot compact history.
error.readonlySessionContinue: The current debug session is read-only and cannot continue completion.
error.readonlySessionSend: The current debug session is read-only and cannot send messages.
error.messageNotContinuable: The current message can no longer be continued.
error.noCheckpoint: No available rewind checkpoint for this message.
error.checkpointFileMissing: Rewind checkpoint file does not exist; cannot rewind.
error.notGitRepo: The current workspace is not a Git repository.
error.noChangesToCommit: There are no changes to commit in the current workspace.
error.notInWorktree: The current session is not in a Worktree and cannot be merged.
error.modelNoImageGenCapability: Model does not declare image generation capability: {{model}}
error.fileChangeSnapshotMissing: File change snapshot missing; skipped this rewind item.
error.ephemeralSessionExpired: Temporary debug session does not exist or has expired.
error.apiKeyNotConfigured: API Key is not configured. Please fill it in Settings.
error.mcpExecutorNotInitialized: Desktop MCP tool executor has not been initialized.
error.extensionHostNotConnected: The current desktop host has not connected the extension host adapter.
error.extensionHostNotAvailable: The current host does not provide an extension runtime environment; please run this extension in Electron Desktop.
error.dreamCollectorModelNotConfigured: Dream collector model is not configured.
error.autoCommitFailedNoKey: Auto-generating commit message failed: current model has no API Key configured.
error.autoCommitFailedNoBody: Auto-generating commit message failed: model returned no body.
error.autoCommitFailedInteractiveTool: Auto-generating commit message failed: commit message generation does not support interactive tool requests ({{name}}).
error.autoCommitFailedIncomplete: Auto-generating commit message failed: model did not complete within the allowed rounds.
error.autoCommitFailedNoMessageField: Auto-generating commit message failed: model did not return a message field.
error.autoCommitFailedEmptyMessage: Auto-generating commit message failed: model returned an empty message.
error.autoCommitFailedInvalidJson: Auto-generating commit message failed: model did not return valid JSON.
error.autoCommitFailedNotObject: Auto-generating commit message failed: model returned JSON that is not an object.
error.notGitRepoForWorktree: The current workspace is not a Git repository; cannot create Worktree.
error.alreadyInWorktree: Already in a Worktree. Please create a new session before creating a Worktree.
error.cannotDetermineBaseBranch: Cannot determine the base branch for the Worktree.
error.autoWorktreeNameFailedNoKey: Auto-generating Worktree name failed: current model has no API Key configured.
error.autoWorktreeNameFailedNoBody: Auto-generating Worktree name failed: model returned no body.
error.autoWorktreeNameFailedInteractiveTool: Auto-generating Worktree name failed: naming generation does not support interactive tool requests ({{name}}).
error.autoWorktreeNameFailedIncomplete: Auto-generating Worktree name failed: model did not complete within the allowed rounds.
error.logSessionExported: Exported: llm_history, full API request traces (including tools and system), full system text:
error.logSessionNote: messages: API form of in-memory llm_history. api_request_trace: each model inference step is a tool_agent_chat_completions call, stream=true, with tools; multiple tool rounds will have multiple traces (one HTTP per round), failed rounds also keep the last request body. system_prompts are system text exported by transport (e.g. tool_agent), for debugging and export.
error.hostNotSupported: The current host does not support previewing Spirit-managed images.
error.unavailable: This image is not available for preview.
error.enterGuidance: Please enter the guidance to send to the model.
error.skillPathOutsideRoot: Skill path is outside the allowed root directory.
error.skillAlreadyExists: A Skill with the same name already exists at this location: {{name}}
error.fileNotAccessible: File does not exist or cannot be accessed
error.fileTooLarge: File is too large to open in the sidebar
error.onlyRegularFile: Can only save as a regular file
error.contentTooLarge: Content is too large to save
error.uncommittedChangesBlockCheckout: There are uncommitted changes in the workspace; cannot switch branches.
error.dreamCollectorApiKeyMissing: Dream collector model API Key is not configured.
error.httpEndpointInvalidUrl: HTTP endpoint must be a valid URL.
error.httpEndpointMissingSchemeHost: HTTP endpoint must include scheme and host.
error.envFormatInvalid: Environment variable format should be KEY=value; multiple entries separated by semicolons.
error.headerFormatInvalid: Header format should be Key: Value; multiple entries separated by semicolons.
error.envKeyRequired: Environment variable name cannot be empty.
error.hostNotSupportAddWorkspace: The current host does not support adding workspaces.
error.hostNotSupportPickWorkspace: The current host does not support selecting workspace directories.

error.hostNotSupportSaveImage: The current host does not support saving images.

error.attachmentsNotSupportedWithSlash: Attachments are not yet supported with Slash commands.

error.pendingApprovalSend: Currently waiting for approval or questionnaire; cannot send a new message directly.
error.completeRequiredQuestion: Please complete the required question first: {{title}}
error.autoWorktreeNameFailedMissingFields: Auto-generating Worktree name failed: model did not return worktreeName or branchName field.
error.autoWorktreeNameFailedEmpty: Auto-generating Worktree name failed: model returned empty names.
error.autoWorktreeNameFailedInvalidWorktreeNam: Auto-generating Worktree name failed: worktreeName format is invalid ({{worktreeName}}).
error.autoWorktreeNameFailedInvalidBranchName: Auto-generating Worktree name failed: branchName format is invalid ({{branchName}}).

demo.compactionUserText: Please continue implementing the Desktop connection wizard: automatically compress history when context approaches the limit, and retain the most recent round of tool results.
demo.compactionSummary:
## Context compressed

- User requested implementation of connection wizard and context compression related UI.
- Discussed OpenAI Responses API, transportKind and provider presets.
- Discarded earlier 8 tool outputs and 3 rounds of chat (~42k tokens), retaining current task and recent read_file results.
demo.compactionAssistantReply: Continuing based on the compressed context: I will add a "Context Compression" style demo entry in Settings and check the spacing between the Compaction block and subsequent assistant replies.

slash.createSkill: Create or tighten a SKILL.md in natural language
slash.logSession: Export current session llm_history and full API request traces and open automatically
slash.startImplementing: Read Spirit-managed plan.md and start implementing directly
slash.compact: Proactively compress current session context history
slash.activateSkillPrompt: Please handle the current task according to skill "{{skillName}}".
